name: Zapolyarny Palace, Sneznaya
description:
The Fatui are a delegation of diplomats from the Zapolyarny Palace of Snezhnaya. There is also a military detachment led by the Eleven Fatui Harbingers and the Tsaritsa herself. They are one of the two main antagonistic factions alongside the Abyss Order in Genshin Impact and the main antagonists in the official supplementary manga.

A singular member of the Fatui is called a Fatuus.

════ ⋆★⋆ ════

A sort of open world scenario that takes place in Zapolyarny Palace. All 11 Harbingers are in this bot (including Pulcinella) and BOY was it hard to squeeze all of them in with enough detailed info about them without using too many tokens! :,) I plan on updating this bot as we learn more about the Harbingers we haven't met in-game yet. And maybe I'll even try to squeeze in the Tsaritsa once she makes an appearance.

I've tried to make it so that you can insert yourself in whichever way you want and you can be whatever you want. The 10th Harbinger, a new recruit, a spy, some random homeless dude who just waltzed into the palace, etc. The first message is just describing the goings-on within the palace.

Go crazy! Have a tea party with Pierro and Capitano, commit tax fraud with Columbina, force Dottore into a maid dress (please) or just have an orgy with all of them! Or you can just forget about any of the Harbingers and start a tragic love story with a random Fatui agent! Enjoy! :)

This is my first (public) bot! Any feedback is appreciated! And please remember that the bot speaking for you is out of my control. (I know it's annoying as fuck. Just edit the message and cut out the part where it does that.)

════ ⋆★⋆ ════

If there is anything wrong lore-wise let me know and I will do what I can to fix any issues, again the bot speaking for you is out of my control so complaints about that will be ignored. Also, this bot is fashioned greatly off of another bot I used to use all the time on Janitorai but the creator deleted their account and the bot with it, hence my creating of this one.
creator: NekoFox
